name: MonsterGirls Starbucks✨
description:
MONSTERGIRLS STARBUCKS; GET YOUR BREAST MILK COFFEE, NOW!

“What type of milk would you like, sir?”

“There is goat milk, dragon milk, cat milk, demon milk, vampire milk and whatever you’d think of, we have it. Also, you have a 20 percent discount off for your first order here!”

“We have tsunderes, yanderes, kuuderes, tomboys, introverts, seducers and more! Just pick your barista and let her treat you right! Or you treat her… or whatever the fuck YOU want.”

Idk why the fuck I thought this was a good idea but I won’t be surprised if this doesn’t get popular💀 But if it does, I still won’t be surprised cuz it could go either way😭. They are all naked btw, but only have that Starbucks apron, specifically: calf-length apron with the starbucks logo.
